hero.subheadline: Stop losing customers to slow sites and manual processes. Our clients get 3x more leads in 60 days.

solutionsSection.headline: Everything you need to grow online
solutionsSection.description: From understanding your data to building the tools your customers use every day.

howWeWork.description: A simple process to get you the results you need.

steps.title: Discover

steps.title: Build

caseStudies.headline: Don't just take our word for it

items.quote: We used to track orders on paper. Bethelmind built us a dispatch app that reduced our delivery errors from 23% to 4% and cut customer complaint calls by half.
Our school portal was a mess. Bethelmind redesigned it so parents can check results and pay fees easily. We collected ₦4.2M in outstanding fees in the first month and parent complaints dropped 80%.

items.q: What if I don't have content ready?
items.a: We help you create it. Our team can assist with writing text and selecting images for your site.

items.q: Do you work with businesses outside Lagos/Ibadan?
items.a: Yes, 100% remote-friendly. We have clients across Nigeria and deliver everything digitally.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept Bank transfer and Paystack installments are available for larger projects.

items.q: Can you integrate with my existing tools?
items.a: Yes, we integrate with Excel, Google Sheets, Paystack, Flutterwave, and WhatsApp Business.

items.q: How much does a website or app cost?
items.a: It depends on your features. Basic business websites start from a lower range, while custom apps cost more. Book a strategy call to get an exact quote.

items.q: How long will it take to build?
items.a: Standard websites take 2-3 weeks. Custom apps can take 4-8 weeks depending on complexity. We agree on a timeline before starting.

benefits: Get 3x more leads from your website

hero.title: About Bethelmind Analytics
hero.subtitle: We are on a mission to democratize data analytics for businesses of all sizes.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Bethelmind, we believe that data is the lifeblood of modern business. However, understanding that data shouldn't require a PhD in statistics. We build tools that make complex data accessible, understandable, and actionable.

values.title: Precision
values.description: We deliver accurate insights you can trust to make critical business decisions.

values.title: Community
values.description: We are building a community of data-driven leaders who support and learn from each other.

values.title: Passion
values.description: We love what we do, and we are passionate about helping our customers succeed.
